meaning: adj.[化]分子间的 存在(或作用)于分子间的
examples: The possible intermolecular energy transfer mechanism was discussed.
Halogen bond is known as a kind of non - covalent intermolecular interaction.
That came from the case where the unlike intermolecular interactions are not as favorable.
Instead of secreting a sticky substance, as you might expect, they owe their adhesive properties to incredibly weak intermolecular attractive forces.
